intel.what: Celonis is a global leader in Process Intelligence and Process Mining technology, providing an enterprise SaaS platform that uses AI to optimize business processes.
intel.scale: large enterprise SaaS company (fastest-growing in its category)
talking_points: Demonstrate interest in AI-assisted demo workflows and process mining automation.
Highlight ability to translate complex business processes (e.g., supply chain, finance) into compelling stories.
Emphasize curiosity about both the technical and commercial sides of enterprise AI.

intel.what: Scalable Capital is a digital investment and banking platform with a full banking licence, serving over one million clients in Europe.
intel.language_culture: English (job posting and company values in English; offices in Germany, UK, Austria, Italy)
talking_points: Emphasize your strong attention to detail and ability to identify trends in HR data, aligning with their focus on data integrity and analytics.
Highlight any experience or coursework in automating People Operations workflows, as they value streamlining manual tasks.
Mention your interest in supporting HR metrics and dashboards to help track departmental performance, directly relevant to the role's responsibilities.

intel.what: Flix is a travel technology company that aims to make travel more accessible, sustainable, and affordable through AI-driven customer service automation.
talking_points: Highlight your ability to interview process owners and document actual workflows, including exceptions and workarounds.
Emphasize comfort with data-driven analysis using process mining tools like Celonis to identify automation opportunities.
Show your skill in translating business rules into precise decision tables that engineers can implement directly.

intel.what: UnternehmerTUM is an innovation and entrepreneurship center that supports startups and established companies in developing new solutions.
talking_points: Experience with AI tools (e.g., Claude, ChatGPT) and automation platforms (e.g., Make, Notion, Zapier)
Interest in applying AI to entrepreneurship education and operational efficiency
Practical, execution-oriented approach with structured independence

intel.what: Airbus is a European multinational aerospace corporation that designs, manufactures, and sells commercial aircraft, helicopters, and defense systems.
intel.language_culture: German (job posting is in German; international environment implied)
talking_points: Hands-on support in the A320 final assembly line, a core product of Airbus
Involvement in process optimization, data analysis, and digital tool implementation
Collaboration with multifunctional teams in a structured student role with flexible hours

intel.what: b2venture is a European venture capital firm founded in 2000 that makes early-stage and stage-agnostic investments, deploying over €100 million per year.
intel.scale: mid-sized VC firm (€100M+ annual deployment, multiple offices)
intel.language_culture: English (job posting in English, Berlin office)
talking_points: Deepen your venture capital experience with active deal sourcing, screening, and due diligence across Europe.
Drive workflow automation and AI integration, leveraging LLMs and no-code platforms to improve investment processes.
Join a firm with a strong angel investor community and a track record backing companies like DeepL, Facebook, and SumUp.

intel.what: Helpling GmbH & Co. KG operates an online marketplace connecting customers with professional cleaning services.
talking_points: Highlight your ability to streamline operations and document processes to support scaling efforts.
Emphasize cross-functional coordination skills, especially bridging data, customer success, and provider support.
Mention your fluency in English and working knowledge of German, as both are required for the role.

intel.what: TOOLPLACE GmbH operates a B2B platform that digitizes quotation, calculation, and procurement processes for the plastic injection molding and tool-making industry.
talking_points: Opportunity to design AI-first automation for core business processes, from sales funnel to project data.
Hands-on work with no/low-code tools like Make, Zapier, n8n and scripting in Python, directly impacting company efficiency.
Close collaboration with founders and product team, with potential to derive a master's thesis topic from the work.

intel.what: Solaris is a Berlin-based embedded finance platform and licensed bank that provides Banking-as-a-Service to businesses.
talking_points: Interest in non-financial risk management and regulatory compliance within a banking-as-a-service environment
Analytical and detail-oriented, with basic knowledge of banking law and regulatory standards
Proficient in Google Workspace/MS Office and clear written communication skills for reporting and incident escalation

intel.what: idealo internet GmbH operates a price comparison platform and runs paid search advertising campaigns across multiple European markets.
talking_points: Direct mentoring from experienced Performance Marketing Managers on real campaign operations
Hands-on ownership of Google Ads tasks such as optimization, reporting, and keyword analysis
Exposure to international campaign management across several European markets

intel.what: TWAICE builds software that transforms battery data into insights to support the energy transition.
talking_points: Hands-on experience with real operational battery data and digital twins
Opportunity to contribute to algorithm and data pipeline development
Customer-facing role in a fast-growing scale-up with flexible hours
